config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, hak individu harus tetap menjadi batas utama, karena kalau kepentingan masyarakat selalu diutamakan tanpa pembatas, mudah sekali dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan terhadap orang lemah atau minoritas. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi harus dicapai dengan cara yang tetap menghormati martabat dan kebebasan dasar setiap orang. Dalam pandangan saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dari individu yang haknya dilindungi dengan kuat.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically come before the individual, because that can easily become an excuse to silence people and ignore minorities. From my perspective as someone from China, social stability and collective responsibility are important, and many people here do value the common good very strongly, but that does not mean individual rights should be treated as disposable. In practice, a healthy society needs a balance: public interests matter, yet they should be limited by basic rights such as dignity, fair treatment, and personal freedom. If the collective is always given priority, the result may look orderly on the surface but become unfair underneath.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu jika dimaknai secara mutlak, karena di Indonesia sendiri kita sering melihat alasan “demi masyarakat” dipakai untuk menekan orang kecil, minoritas, atau yang kritis. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi bagi saya harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar individu, sebab tanpa batas itu negara atau mayoritas bisa merasa selalu benar. Justru masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling patuh, melainkan yang mampu menjaga ketertiban sambil tetap melindungi martabat dan kebebasan setiap orang. Kalau ada benturan, prioritas sosial boleh dipertimbangkan, tetapi tidak boleh sampai menghapus hak dasar individu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not support the statement as written, because “society first” too easily becomes a justification for ignoring ordinary people when power is involved. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why collective interests and social stability are valued, but I have also seen how quickly “for the greater good” can be used to silence complaints and treat inconvenience as if it were a moral crime. A strong society is not one that simply demands sacrifice from individuals; it is one that protects basic rights while still asking people to share responsibility for the common good. So I would say society and the individual should be balanced, but individual rights must set the bottom line.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap tidak setuju dengan pernyataan itu kalau dimaknai bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan secara umum dan tanpa batas. Dari pengalaman melihat konteks Indonesia, alasan “demi ketertiban” atau “demi kepentingan umum” terlalu sering dipakai untuk menekan yang lemah, jadi bagi saya hak individu harus menjadi batas bawah yang tidak boleh dilanggar. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi kalau hak dasar bisa dikorbankan seenaknya, yang terjadi bukan masyarakat kuat, melainkan mayoritas atau penguasa yang makin leluasa. Jadi, prioritas boleh dipertimbangkan dalam situasi tertentu, tetapi martabat, kebebasan, dan perlindungan hukum individu tetap harus jadi pegangan utama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the statement as a general rule, because in my view society cannot be trusted to override individual rights whenever it claims a higher purpose. From my perspective as someone from China, I do value social order, responsibility, and the idea that people should not only think about themselves, but I also know how easily “the common good” can be used to dismiss personal grievances and silence weaker voices. A society may look stable when individuals are told to sacrifice too much, but that stability is fragile if people feel they have no real protection. For me, individual rights must remain the bottom line, and social interests should only be pursued within that limit.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
